items.title: Municipio 5.4.9
items.body:
## Municipio 5.4.9

Version **5.4.9** of Municipio is a maintenance release that fixes some minor bugs and includes improvements to image handling.

---

### 🎨 Municipio Theme (5.175.3 → 5.175.6)

- Updated image rendering on Schools, making images display within a slider for better presentation.

items.title: Release 5.4.8
items.body:
## Municipio 5.4.8

Version **5.4.8** of Municipio is a maintenance release that fixes some minor bugs and includes improvements across Modularity, the Municipio Theme, Component Library, and supporting plugins.

---

### 🧩 Modularity (6.90.26 → 6.90.36)

- Improved security by cleaning and sanitizing post excerpts.  
- Fixed an issue where pagination for posts could return outdated results due to caching.  
- Enabled videos to be used as links in sliders.  
- Updated and simplified the menu module’s notification message.  
- Removed unnecessary choice options from the menu module.  
- Corrected language and text for menu notices.  
- Fixed styling and behavior of the date badge.  
- Removed the profile URL to prevent unwanted links from appearing.  
- Improved layout handling by removing automatic column calculations.  
- Fixed placement issues in the menu module.  

---

### 🎨 Municipio Theme (5.172.31 → 5.175.3)

- Fixed an issue where image normalization ran in the wrong order.  
- Reduced complexity and improved structure in the Singular Event Controller.  
- Updated and improved translations across the system.  
- Added support to display event details based on occasions found in the event schedule.  
- Upgraded the test framework for better reliability.  
- Removed unused development dependencies.  
- Removed outdated PHPUnit watcher configuration.  
- Fixed an issue where getting queried objects could fail unexpectedly.  
- Removed unnecessary test coverage files from version control.  
- Fixed errors in the event schema for better data consistency.  
- Ensured filters run correctly when generating intermediate image files.  
- Added missing translations.  
- Fixed an issue with event calendar links pointing to incorrect occasions.  
- Improved file handling by removing unnecessary caching.  
- Added support for multiple locations in schools and preschools.  
- Suppressed non-critical warnings when normalizing images.  
- Allowed administrators to manually synchronize external content.  
- Fixed layout and display issues in the date badge.  
- Added a new controller and view for event archives.  
- Added a new customization section for the date badge.  
- Removed duplicate code for `employmentType` and `datePosted`.  
- Updated style guide.  
- Improved namespacing in Schema controllers.  

---

### 🧱 Component Library (4.62.4 → 4.62.13)

- Fixed an issue that caused errors when counting certain data types.  
- Corrected faulty test code related to maximum image size.  
- Cleaned up article text by removing unsafe or invalid links.  
- Fixed a problem where multiple files were added automatically when uploading.  
- Fixed a button issue to ensure “resolve” actions work properly.  
- Removed an incorrect parameter from video notices.  
- Allowed slider items to include a call-to-action button even when no title is set.  
- Adjusted menus so border styling only applies to top-level items.  
- Improved the appearance and structure of the date badge.  
- Updated and stabilized internal tests.  
- Prevented segments from rendering empty elements.  

---

### ⚙️ WordPress Core (6.8.3)

- Updated WordPress to **6.8.3**, which includes important security and bug fixes.

---

### ☁️ S3 Local Index (1.1.20)

- Added **S3 Local Index** plugin, which creates a local index of an S3 bucket to reduce the number of external calls to S3 or Swift storage.

items.title: Release 5.4.7
items.body:
# Release Notes

## Modularity (6.90.25 → 6.90.26)
- Resolved an issue where block IDs caused empty `getField` responses.  

## Municipio Theme (5.172.27 → 5.172.31)
- Fixed an issue with the target selector on navigation menu items related to the item wrapper.  
- Images imported by the External Content feature are now hidden in the media library.  
- Images in the External Content feature are now handled as objects for better consistency.

items.title: Release 5.4.6
items.body:
# Release Notes

## Active Directory API WP Integration (3.1.0 → 3.1.5)
- Fixed an issue that prevented users from logging in manually if their password wasn’t stored before.  
- Fixed an issue where accounts could not be synced in bulk.  
- Updated the interval of bulk synchronization to one hour.  

## API Alarm Integration (4.1.4 → 4.1.6)
- Changed alert level to automatically communicate to level 3 instead of level 2.  
- Alarm list icons now use the icon select field.  

## API Event Manager Integration (2.0.39 → 2.0.40)
- Updated the category dropdown to appear as checkboxes, allowing multi-select.  

## Component Library (4.62.2 → 4.62.4)
- Allowed `isShortcode` as a known internal parameter that components silently accept.  
- Fixed title markup in accordion titles to validate correctly.  

## Modularity (6.90.21 → 6.90.25)
- Fixed pagination for post modules (URL escaping fix).  
- Added support for extra CSS classes entered on block level in Gutenberg blocks.  
- `getID` function now returns a valid ID when called on blocks (note: string return type now allowed).  
- Normalized post headings in certain views to better fit the surrounding context.  

## Municipio Theme (5.172.13 → 5.172.27)
- Updated the inline image component for better compatibility with PHP 8.4.  
- Improved login time tracking.  
- Ensured default roles are set correctly in multisite environments.  
- Fixed issue with comment replies not working.  
- General reliability and stability improvements.  

## WordPress
- Updated to WordPress 6.8.2.  

## ACF Extended
- Removed **ACF Extended**, which was deprecated in the previous release.

items.title: Release 5.4.5
items.body:
## Algolia-index (3.2.3…3.2.4)
- Refactoring to allow multiple providers to be used.  
- In this case Typesense as a drop-in replacement of Algolia.

## Api Alarm Integration (4.1.3…4.1.4)
- Removes a trailing slash sanitization from api-url.  
- Allows query params to be sent in resource url.

## Api Event Manager Integration (2.0.38…2.0.39)
- Allows rendering when no tags are present.

## Component Library (4.60.1…4.62.2)
- **fix(Date):** allow format override  
- **feat(Nav): extended dropdown view**  
  - Added support for extended dropdown in nav component.  
  - New Blade templates: `content.blade.php`, `extended.blade.php`  
  - New option: `isExtendedDropdown` in `nav.json`  
  - Async children support and extended dropdown styling  
- **fix(Person):** add missing class and other attributes to person component  
- **fix(Hero):** allow video without content  
- **fix(Image):** reduce calls to resolver when building container query data  
- **fix(Image):** avoid calling resolver more than needed  
- **refactor(Nav):** restructured nav view, moved logic into `content.blade.php`

## Modularity (6.90.13…6.90.21)
- Fixed issue where shortcodes could render a module view twice  
- Made module base more testable  
- Added recommendation for extension usage  
- Fixed warnings about missing view key  
- Improved handling of public taxonomies (only show public ones)  
- Rewritten headings in accordion post module for better structure  
- Fixed issue when removing choices in fields  
- Fixed error with post argument type in certain cases  

## Modularity Timeline (4.1.1…4.1.2)
- Adds the ability to render as a sequential timeline without dates.

## Municipio Theme (5.164.3…5.172.13)
- Fixed occasion text handling for exhibitions  
- Hide gallery title if no gallery in exhibitions  
- Added custom archive date format for exhibitions  
- Added Customizer option for extended dropdown menu  
- Implemented on-demand image resizing  
- Fixed flexible header search button styling  
- Added bordered setting for drawer menu  
- Fixed password-protected page markup error  
- Added background color support for dropdown menus  
- Fixed circular structure issue in menus  
- Added controllers and views for Elementary School and Preschool  
- Integrated events into Preschool and Elementary School  
- Allowed selecting post field columns for archive list view  
- Sorted taxonomy filter options as numbers if all are numeric  
- Fixed event price error display  
- Sideload all images in schema objects  
- Fixed schools page crash caused by missing image ID  
- Added missing translations  

## Modularity Dynamic Guides (1.4.8…1.4.10)
- Removes the requirement of having Acf Extended installed.

items.title: Release 5.4.4
items.body:
## Municipio Theme (5.165.1)
- Updates the **ImageConvert** feature to support adding additional conversion strategies in the future.  
- Introduces a new **object caching system** in ImageConvert to prevent repeated attempts to convert images that have already been processed or failed previously.  
- Implements a **conversion tracking system** that provides real-time knowledge of ongoing conversions, preventing multiple concurrent conversions of the same asset on the same request or across concurrent requests.  
- Adds a **detailed logging system** to ImageConvert, enabling identification of performance issues related to images that fail to convert or are frequently reprocessed.  

## Modularity (6.90.15)
- Removes **ACF Extended** as a required plugin dependency.  

## Deployment
- Adds an updated version of **ACF Extended** to the main deployment procedure, ensuring compatibility with the latest release of the **ACF Pro** plugin.

items.title: Release 5.4.1
items.body:
# Release Notes

This release focuses on upgrading the performance of the icon selector by replacing it with a custom field.  
This change decreases delivered DOM size in the admin interface, making the Gutenberg editor more performant.

---

## Municipio Theme (5.164.1)
- Removes `PrefillIcon` class  
- Implements replacement field for icon selector in all occurrences  
- **Exhibition Event**
  - Update exhibition event gallery position  
  - Allow subtypes of Event schema to have `startDate` and `endDate` meta  
  - Update position of date and place on exhibition event  
  - Add missing expired event notice text  

## Modularity (6.90.9)
- Implements replacement field for icon selector in all occurrences  
- Fixes an issue where post module could be saved without a selected view, causing a fatal error  

## Acf Icon Field (0.2.42)
- Introduces a new icon field providing a visual selector of Material icons

items.title: Release 5.4.0
items.body:
# Release Notes

This release focuses on resolving issues with the previous release.  
It introduces **Vite** for compiling scripts and styles in **Municipio Theme** and **Styleguide**.

---

## Municipio Theme (5.163.9)
- Adds a **Trashed page** for media items, allowing users to revert trashed files.
- Replaced **Webpack** with **Vite** as a build system.
- Enqueue new Vite-compiled files as **modules**.
- Adds **ExhibitionEvent Schema** view.
- Add **alt text** to emblem placeholder when an image is missing.
- Allow **font/ namespace** when populating the font selector for custom fonts in customizer.
- Ensure that images are correctly rendered in **Gutenberg editor**.
- Removes some obsolete code related to **TinyMCE editor (plugins)**.
- **Splide Core** is now compiled as a separate asset.
- Update language file for **Swedish translation**.

---

## Styleguide (0.11.1312)
- Updates to an **ESM compatible Leaflet MarkerCluster** that avoids monkeypatching of the global instance.
- Update to new version of **Sass**, and uses **Vite** as build system.
- **Slider steppers** are now unclickable, to meet clickable area size standards.
- **Right alignment fix** for collection items.

---

## Component Library (4.60.0)
- Links in **email addresses** now support **hyphens**.
- Removes a direct call to a **WordPress function** in breadcrumb.
- Do not include a link text if no link is found in **Card component**.
- Adds a new modifier that places **link last** in collection items.

---

## ACF UX Collapse (2.0.7)
- Declares a missing variable in **JavaScript**, preventing breakage in some cases.

---

## ACF OpenStreetMap Field (0.79.12)
- Inactivates **block dragging**, to avoid issues with map.

items.title: Release 5.3.5
items.body:
## Modularity Guides ([4.0.5](https://github.com/helsingborg-stad/modularity-guides/))
* Converted javascript to typescript
* Generating email content in the backend instead of frontend
* New API to generate mail introduced
* Transformer to group action items by subject
* Updated all outdated external dependencies
* Consolidated translations to separate class

items.title: Release 5.3.4
items.body:
# Release Notes ## Municipio (5.3.4) Patch release that refines appearance on popular functions. --- ## Algolia Search JS (3.3.5) - Fix an issue where images in search results were not hidden on mobile devices. --- ## Alarm Integration (4.1.3) - Adds a new module that renders alarms in a refined way. - This module consolidates similar alarms. - Old alarm module will be deprecated after user feedback. --- ## Attachment Revisions (3.0.8) - Fix build of CSS/JS file. --- ## Broken Link Detector (4.2.12) - Improve detection of broken internal links (on-site). --- ## Component Library (4.59.9) - Adds detection of incompatible HTML in slots (e.g., `` tags in slot content on already linked components). - Silences a warning in timeline component. - Updates contact module with a new view option. - Image rendering now falls back to a default value when aspect ratio cannot be resolved (16/9). - Adds a new layout option for hero module. - Adjusted rendering class to reduce the risk of intermittent broken markup. - Fixes broken markup in logotype grid component. - Support for displaying the heading above the image in card component. - Support for showing a clickable button instead of linking the whole item in card component. - Updates to file input: - Accepted file types - Error handling - Accepted file sizes - Preview of uploaded data - Link component now handles hyphens in links correctly. - Remove/check availability of WP function in breadcrumb component. --- ## Modularity Like Posts (2.14.5) - Fix an issue that caused data fetch to not have the user ID available. --- ## Modularity (6.90.0) - New layout option for contacts display (#896). - Icon placed to the right in collection item (#913). - Ensure blog name is added when appropriate in posts module (#903). - Mitigate warnings in various locations. - "Read more" fix with correct handling of default value (#893). - Shortcodes are missing `

` tags for text module (#915). - Allow map providers in CSP (#914). - Posts module: remove a custom tag sanitizer (#894). - Cleanup contacts module, making it more readable (#907). - Refactor the **Edit Modules** button to a more standard implementation in block editor. --- ## Modularity Open Street Map (2.7.8) - Fixes a rendering issue causing `&` to render as clear text. - Improves performance in Gutenberg editor. --- ## ACF OpenStreetMap Field (0.79.11) - Improves performance in Gutenberg editor. --- ## Municipio Theme (5.159.18) - Common Field Group now resolves select fields that return labels instead of values correctly on subsites in a network. - Fix to prevent images from being parsed more than once in content. - Adds more language strings and translations. - New feature: **Accessibility Declaration** (shareable across a whole network via Common Field Group). - Fixes styling on the "collapsible search" feature in header. - Introduces custom colors to a color palette for reuse throughout Municipio. - Inline images now properly support captions. - Allow more file formats: - Variants of existing MIME types (e.g., `dwg`, `dotx`). - More file formats by default for editors/administrators. - Fixes an issue where theme options were unavailable on translated sites in admin UI. - Fixes an issue where URLs showed instead of labels on error pages. - Fixes an issue where Table of Contents displayed even if the feature was turned off. - Fixes an issue causing pages with Table of Contents to scroll to first section on load. - Graphical adjustments on featured images in article layouts. - Added validation on `getImage` function in post object to prevent broken image display. - Fix Blade engine initialization causing intermittent rendering anomalies. --- ## Schema Posts - Creates fixed taxonomies for posts using schema. - Posts from external sources do not allow editing schema data. - Updated UI for editing local posts using schema type. - Mirrored posts now link to the original URL instead of faking a local version. --- ## Focus Point (0.2.5) - Fixes general issues with JavaScript execution. - Resolved an issue with JS loading that could crash WordPress Customizer. --- ## WP Security (1.8.3) - Added an admin interface to allow users to add custom domains to CSP policy. - Improved domain handling, preserving port numbers during extraction. - Improved content parsing to automatically add domains not detected before.
